A Club For
Every Kind of Day.

Designed to become part of your routine. Work when you need to focus. Golf when you need a break. Share a meal, bring the family, or simply stay a while.

Become a Founding Member Take a Look Inside
Welcome to the East | West Club

A Place to Return To.

East | West began with a simple belief: the best lives make room for two kinds of energy. The drive to move forward, and the ability to return to what matters.

The club is built for both. A place for work and play, ambition and health, conversation and quiet. Somewhere you never need an occasion to come in, only a reason to stay.

How It Feels

Built Around the Ordinary Tuesday.

8:12 AM

The Morning Begins Slowly.

Coffee before the inbox. A conversation before the meetings. Work that feels a little less like work.
12:47 PM

A Round Between Everything Else.

Not a day off. Just ninety minutes that changes the rest of the afternoon.
7:36 PM

Somehow, Everyone Ends Up Here.

The game is on. Dinner arrives. Someone stays longer than they planned.
“We weren’t trying to build another country club. We were trying to build the kind of place you’d stop by on a Tuesday without thinking twice.”
Shankar & Ryan, Founders
Get to Know the Founders

Take a Look Inside.

Every space serves a purpose. Some help you focus. Others help you unwind. Together, they’re designed to become part of your everyday routine.
